name: Christmas Vegetable Salad Mold
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine gelatin and cold water in a saucepan. Slowly heat over low heat, stirring constantly until the gelatin is clear and dissolved.
2. Add chicken broth, salt, dill weed, and sugar; mix well.
3. Chill until it reaches the consistency of beaten egg whites.
4. Fold in the remaining ingredients except lettuce; mix carefully.
5. Turn into one 3-cup mold or six 1/2-cup molds.
6. Cover lightly with clear plastic wrap. Chill until set.
7. Unmold and serve on crisp lettuce leaves.
Food Exchanges per serving: 1/2 SKIM MILK EXCHANGE; CAL: 44; CHO: 6g; PRO: 4g; FAT: 0g; SOD: 246
Omit salt. Substitute low-sodium chicken broth.
